purpose: Build preset matrix — eight configurations spanning Visual Studio 2026 (default/release), Ninja (debug/release/relwithdebinfo), Clang+Ninja (debug/release), and MinGW-w64 cross-compile from WSL. Each writes its build tree under build/<presetName>/.
invariants: cmakeMinimumRequired here is 3.28 — older than CMakeLists.txt's 4.2. The effective minimum is whichever is higher (CMake will refuse if neither is met). Keep this loose or in sync; the CI install pinned CMake >=4.2.
binaryDir is always ${sourceDir}/build/${presetName}; CI workflows assume this path when locating compiled binaries.
VS generator name 'Visual Studio 18 2026' must match the VS2026 generator string exactly — typos cause 'unknown generator' at configure.
MinGW preset sets CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME=Windows to enable cross-compile detection in JUCE.
gotchas: Adding a new preset requires also adding a matching buildPresets entry, otherwise `cmake --build --preset=<name>` fails with 'no build preset named <name>'.
CI uses --preset=release on Windows and --preset=ninja-release on Linux; renaming these preset names without updating both workflow YAMLs breaks releases.
